name: @zeststream/motion
description: ZestStream motion primitives — SpringSheet, SpringChip, ConfidenceBadge, StreamingText, SkeletonMatch. Reusable React components built on @zeststream/motion-tokens spring presets. Reduced-motion safe.

design_sources: Robinhood — spring physics budget (A2): damping 22-28, stiffness 300-400
Citizen — live-confirmation pulse (A3): one ring, 1200ms expand, 4s cycle
Linear — instant-snap menus, zero delay before motion starts
AI-native 2025-2026 — streaming text with cursor-first, skeleton-matches-layout, categorical confidence signals
